# Copilot Instructions

This project is an Astro server-side rendered (SSR) application designed to help users browse and manage their personal comics library. It features a clean UI built with Astro components and Preact islands for interactivity, styled using Tailwind CSS. The application leverages Nanostores for client-side state management and includes API routes for data fetching and manipulation.

## Project overview
- Package manager: npm
- Node version: check `.nvmrc`
- Language: TypeScript


## Commands

```sh
npm run dev          # start dev server
npm run type:check   # typecheck (Astro check)
npm run build        # production build
npx vitest run       # run tests
```

## Learn more

Check out the docs in the `docs/` folder for more details about the project.
